subcodes.first_line: O thou son of the associate and companion of Abdul-Baha! You brought many letters with you from those regions
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای يزدان مهربان آن جمع پريشان تو اند و آن انجمن ياران تو ديده ها باز است
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @being a source of light; guidance, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
